goals.description: Lock in the term project at 98%+ and execute a hard shutdown immediately to reclaim mental space for tomorrow's cohort meeting; no doom-scrolling.
goals.rationale: My achievement drive is screaming that leaving this incomplete is unacceptable when the deadline is three days out. The impulsive urge to procrastinate on sleep is dangerous—I know from experience that crashing tomorrow will ruin the final push, so I'm prioritizing the finish line now. Also, getting this done instantly silences the nagging guilt about low-stakes tasks failing again.
